title: Oil and gas: Public Statements relating to 2024 operations
body: "All operators of offshore oil and gas installations are required to produce an annual public statement covering activities carried out in the previous year.  Please note ‘No operations in 2024’ means there was no requirements for an EMS submission in 2024   DNO North Sea (ROBG) Limited - No operations in 2024 Fairfield Betula Limited - No response received from Operator Neptune E&P UK Ltd - No response received from Operator Teekay (Golar-Nor (UK) Limited) - No response received from Operator  "
